case_title: SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INE VS. ALEJANDRO LEON et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-24-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, ALEJANDRO 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INE SERVED FEB-27-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, ALEJANDRO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $149.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, ALEJANDRO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, ALEJANDRO $4,007.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,145.20 INTEREST, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,961.20, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5961.20. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT 1-5
